text:
Approved.

I was about to submit a patch myself.
On Dec 3, 2010 10:00 PM, "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/parallel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/152821 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/152821

> --
